scene_title: Moeda digital de banco central com correntes douradas
narrative_beat: CBDC como prisao programavel em carmesim e ouro

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid central bank digital currency coin symbol in crimson and gold with digital control grid overlaid and visible golden chains binding the currency as programmable prison in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the golden chains binding the CBDC coin and the digital control grid overlaid
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated central bank building with classical columns in grey in background
props: CBDC coin in crimson and gold

mood.emotion: CBDC — money with an expiry date and behavioral conditions

symbolism.primary: the currency as leash — without the mark you cannot buy or sell
symbolism.secondary: classical columns as the old financial order converted into a cage

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
